sections.instruction: Questions 1-3: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD AND/ OF A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 4-6: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 7-10: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: What aspect of the flight does the man complain about?
What does the man think about the food served during the flight?
options: A it is not enough to eat
C it has a bad taste

questions.content: What does the man think of the service of the staff?
The man felt satisfied with {{BLANK}} because it was quick.
During the flight {{BLANK}} facilities helped him distract from other poor quality of the service.
As a gift a 20% discount on the {{BLANK}} fees will be offered.
The flight company also offers the man a {{BLANK}} worth £20.

sections.instruction: Questions 11-16: What is customer’s attitude towards the following services? Write the correct letter A, B or C next to questions 11-16. A they are very interested B they might be less interested C they are not interested. Questions 17-20: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: a free gift
options: B they might be less interested

questions.content: a driver for an extra fee
options: B they might be less interested

questions.content: a package service
options: B they might be less interested

questions.content: updated car models
options: B they might be less interested

questions.content: a discount
options: B they might be less interested

questions.content: a new branch company
options: B they might be less interested

questions.content: What is the problem of the public transport?
According to the speaker what is true about the transportation?
options: A buses are easy to find

questions.content: According to the speaker what is true about the bus?
options: A passengers occasionally spend more than half an hour waiting for it

questions.content: What is the existing situation about the price of bus tickets?
options: C it needs to be increased

sections.instruction: Questions 21-25: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 26-30: Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: What was the most difficult problem when the company was founded?
What is the staff unsatisfied with?
What was the problem of the manager?
options: A he had a lot of tasks to do
B he employed too many people and let them go then
C he always made decisions by himself

questions.content: What does the staff think of the new manager of the company?
options: A they are delighted to see that the meeting time is shorter
B they feel annoyed toward him
C they are amazed that he had done it well

questions.content: What achievement has the organization made already?
options: A children were involved in painting the entrance area
B there was no particular achievement
C it built a local primary school
